lines: The Fever are 9-7, third in the Eastern Conference after a loss to the Atlanta Dream yesterday. They’ll host the Phoenix Mercury at 8 p.m. tomorrow, with Caitlin Clark averaging about 21 a game.
The Indianapolis Indians beat the Iowa Cubs 7‑4 yesterday, and the series is on at 2:08 p.m. today.
The Indy Fuel will play the Wheeling Nailers on Oct 16 at 7:15 p.m. in the ECHL.
Escape hatch: you follow this way closer than I do.
